name: Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Large Ripe Tomatoes, cut into wedges
2 Tablespoons Kalamata Olives, pitted and chopped
1 Tablespoon Extra Virgin Olive Oil, or more as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Allow the salad to stand for 20 minutes.
3. Toss the salad gently.
4. Serve and enjoy.
